response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and geospatial experience with open-source contributions like GISCollective, but lacks direct evidence of modern C++ or Rust expertise in routing/tiling pipelines. His distributed systems and low-latency work at Sociomantic and Altom are relevant, though the role's core technical requirements are only partially met.
strengths: Proven geospatial experience with GISCollective, an open-source platform used by NGOs for mapping
Strong background in distributed systems and low-latency applications (e.g., Sociomantic's micro-services handling millions of requests/sec)
Diverse technical leadership across full-stack, embedded, and dev-ops roles, showing adaptability
concerns: No explicit mention of modern C++ or Rust experience, which are primary requirements for the role
Geospatial work focuses on web/mobile platforms (Node.js/Ember.js) rather than routing data pipelines or tiling
Recent roles emphasize TypeScript/Node.js and AI tooling, diverging from the role's core technical stack
